title: piper aduncum subsp. ossanum
intro: Piper aduncum subsp. ossanum, also known as the "Ossan pepper tree", is a subspecies of the Piper aduncum plant, a tropical evergreen tree native to the Pacific Islands and Southeast Asia. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, attributed to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Piper aduncum subsp. ossanum include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Piper aduncum subsp. ossanum include infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
